title: Letjolt White Calla Lily 20Pcs Artificial Flowers Bouquet for Wedding Bride Shower Blessing Gift Home Decoration Faux Calla Lilies Flower, 20 Pieces
features: Material : Flowers are made of PU, Stems are using metal wire as skeleton and wrapped by plastic. The flower has a real touch, No colorfast even if water wash it
Each packing has 20 pieces of artificial calla lily flowers. Flower height 13.7 inches
Calla lilies are a must-have choice at the wedding party. Use them as the bridal bouquet or put them as the centerpieces on the table or DIY your own brooch.
Applicable for: Home, office, shop, party, garden, Wedding, and special events.
Distinctive artificial flowers, due to being handmade, each batch of flowers may have moderate color difference
